# Realistic composite

The "this is what I'd actually write" query — filters + sort + group + limit + hide combined.

## Open work due this month, grouped by priority

```tasks
not done
path includes work
due before 2026-06-01
group by priority
sort by due
limit 20
hide tags
hide created date
hide backlinks
```

## Recurring health tasks, grouped by recurrence pattern

```tasks
is recurring
path includes personal
group by recurrence
sort by scheduled
hide priority
hide created date
```
